raw_consumer_statement:
I disputed a {$13000.00} travel charge because no services were rendered. On XX/XX/year>, I was unable to travel due to a government airspace shutdown and the trip did not occur. The hotel provided no stay and no refund, only a restricted credit that is not equivalent. 
I also purchased travel insurance, which has now been formally denied. The XXXX  Insurance Department completed its review and confirmed no benefits are payable, leaving a total loss. 
I requested that Barclays reopen and reclassify the dispute under XXXX Reason Code 4855 ( services not rendered ) based on this new evidence. Barclays has not provided a way to submit additional documentation or confirmed a proper re-review.

No trip, no service, no refund, and no insurance payout were received. The transaction resulted in zero benefit and should be reversed.
